name: weapp-tailwindcss-monorepo
description: 把tailwindcss jit引擎，带给小程序开发者们! bring tailwindcss jit engine to miniprogram developers!
author: ice breaker <1324318532@qq.com>

scripts.build: cross-env WEAPP_TW_SKIP_INTERACTIVE_TARO_BUILD=1 WEAPP_TW_SKIP_INTERACTIVE_UNI_BUILD=1 turbo run build
scripts.build:nocache: cross-env TURBO_FORCE=1 WEAPP_TW_SKIP_INTERACTIVE_TARO_BUILD=1 WEAPP_TW_SKIP_INTERACTIVE_UNI_BUILD=1 turbo run build
scripts.build:apps: echo "apps workspace has no demo projects"
scripts.build:demo: cross-env WEAPP_TW_SKIP_INTERACTIVE_TARO_BUILD=1 WEAPP_TW_SKIP_INTERACTIVE_UNI_BUILD=1 turbo run build --filter=./demo/*
scripts.test:release: vitest run --project=weapp-tailwindcss test/ci/publish-packages.test.ts test/options.test.ts test/tailwindcss/v4/patcher.integration.test.ts --coverage.enabled=false && pnpm --filter @weapp-tailwindcss/experimental test -- --coverage.enabled=false && pnpm --filter @weapp-tailwindcss/minify-preserve test -- --coverage.enabled=false && pnpm --filter weapp-style-injector test -- --coverage.enabled=false && pnpm --filter @weapp-tailwindcss/ui test -- --coverage.enabled=false && vitest run --project=@weapp-tailwindcss-example/node-api-core --coverage.enabled=false
scripts.e2e:static: cross-env E2E_SKIP_OPEN_AUTOMATOR=1 vitest run -c ./e2e/vitest.e2e.config.ts --exclude e2e/multiplatform-build-output.test.ts --exclude e2e/demo-user-workflow-output.test.ts --exclude e2e/preprocessor-source.test.ts --exclude e2e/framework-ci-support.test.ts --exclude e2e/framework-ide-support.test.ts --exclude e2e/hbuilderx-local.test.ts --exclude e2e/taro-web-demo-hmr.test.ts --exclude e2e/web-vite-demo-hmr.test.ts --exclude e2e/uni-app-vite-tailwindcss-dev-h5.test.ts --exclude e2e/templates-build-smoke.test.ts --exclude e2e/templates-ide-smoke.test.ts --exclude e2e/templates-dev-hmr-smoke.test.ts
scripts.e2e:static:u: cross-env E2E_SKIP_OPEN_AUTOMATOR=1 vitest run -u -c ./e2e/vitest.e2e.config.ts --exclude e2e/multiplatform-build-output.test.ts --exclude e2e/demo-user-workflow-output.test.ts --exclude e2e/preprocessor-source.test.ts --exclude e2e/framework-ci-support.test.ts --exclude e2e/framework-ide-support.test.ts --exclude e2e/hbuilderx-local.test.ts --exclude e2e/taro-web-demo-hmr.test.ts --exclude e2e/web-vite-demo-hmr.test.ts --exclude e2e/uni-app-vite-tailwindcss-dev-h5.test.ts --exclude e2e/templates-build-smoke.test.ts --exclude e2e/templates-ide-smoke.test.ts --exclude e2e/templates-dev-hmr-smoke.test.ts
scripts.e2e:ci: cross-env E2E_SKIP_OPEN_AUTOMATOR=1 vitest run --maxWorkers=1 -c ./e2e/vitest.e2e.config.ts && cross-env E2E_FRAMEWORK_SUPPORT=1 E2E_SKIP_OPEN_AUTOMATOR=1 vitest run --maxWorkers=1 -c ./e2e/vitest.e2e.config.ts e2e/framework-ci-support.test.ts
scripts.e2e:ide: cross-env E2E_IDE=1 E2E_IDE_BUILD=1 vitest run --bail=1 -c ./e2e/vitest.e2e.config.ts e2e/framework-ide-support.test.ts
scripts.e2e:ide:skip-build: cross-env E2E_IDE=1 E2E_IDE_BUILD=0 vitest run --bail=1 -c ./e2e/vitest.e2e.config.ts e2e/framework-ide-support.test.ts
scripts.e2e:ide:case: cross-env E2E_IDE=1 E2E_IDE_BUILD=1 E2E_IDE_PROBE_RETRIES=0 vitest run --bail=1 -c ./e2e/vitest.e2e.config.ts e2e/framework-ide-support.test.ts
scripts.e2e:ide:case:skip-build: cross-env E2E_IDE=1 E2E_IDE_BUILD=0 E2E_IDE_PROBE_RETRIES=0 vitest run --bail=1 -c ./e2e/vitest.e2e.config.ts e2e/framework-ide-support.test.ts
scripts.e2e:ide:issues-909-916-928: cross-env E2E_IDE=1 E2E_SKIP_BUILD=0 vitest run --bail=1 -c ./e2e/vitest.e2e.config.ts e2e/issue-909-ide.test.ts
scripts.e2e:ide:issues-909-916-928:skip-build: cross-env E2E_IDE=1 E2E_SKIP_BUILD=1 vitest run --bail=1 -c ./e2e/vitest.e2e.config.ts e2e/issue-909-ide.test.ts
scripts.e2e:ide:full: pnpm e2e:ide && pnpm e2e:ide:issues-909-916-928 && pnpm e2e:ide:where && pnpm e2e:ide:root-selectors && pnpm e2e:ide:visual
scripts.e2e:h5: pnpm e2e:taro:h5-build && pnpm e2e:taro:web-hmr && pnpm e2e:web:hmr
scripts.e2e:app: pnpm e2e:android && pnpm e2e:ios && pnpm e2e:harmony
scripts.e2e:hbuilderx:local:mp: cross-env E2E_HBUILDERX_LOCAL=1 E2E_HBUILDERX_CASE_GROUP=mp vitest run --bail=1 -c ./e2e/vitest.e2e.config.ts e2e/hbuilderx-local.test.ts
scripts.e2e:hbuilderx:local:web: cross-env E2E_HBUILDERX_LOCAL=1 E2E_HBUILDERX_CASE_GROUP=web vitest run --bail=1 -c ./e2e/vitest.e2e.config.ts e2e/hbuilderx-local.test.ts
scripts.e2e:hbuilderx:local:app: cross-env E2E_HBUILDERX_LOCAL=1 E2E_HBUILDERX_CASE_GROUP=app vitest run --bail=1 -c ./e2e/vitest.e2e.config.ts e2e/hbuilderx-local.test.ts
scripts.e2e:hbuilderx:local:android: cross-env E2E_HBUILDERX_LOCAL=1 E2E_HBUILDERX_CASE_GROUP=app E2E_HBUILDERX_APP_PLATFORM=app-android vitest run --bail=1 -c ./e2e/vitest.e2e.config.ts e2e/hbuilderx-local.test.ts
scripts.e2e:hbuilderx:local:ios: cross-env E2E_HBUILDERX_LOCAL=1 E2E_HBUILDERX_CASE_GROUP=app E2E_HBUILDERX_APP_PLATFORM=app-ios vitest run --bail=1 -c ./e2e/vitest.e2e.config.ts e2e/hbuilderx-local.test.ts
scripts.e2e:hbuilderx:local:harmony: cross-env E2E_HBUILDERX_LOCAL=1 E2E_HBUILDERX_CASE_GROUP=app E2E_HBUILDERX_APP_PLATFORM=app-harmony vitest run --bail=1 -c ./e2e/vitest.e2e.config.ts e2e/hbuilderx-local.test.ts
scripts.e2e:hbuilderx:local:mp-alipay: cross-env E2E_HBUILDERX_LOCAL=1 E2E_HBUILDERX_CASE_GROUP=mp E2E_HBUILDERX_MP_PLATFORM=mp-alipay vitest run --bail=1 -c ./e2e/vitest.e2e.config.ts e2e/hbuilderx-local.test.ts
scripts.e2e:hbuilderx:local:mp-baidu: cross-env E2E_HBUILDERX_LOCAL=1 E2E_HBUILDERX_CASE_GROUP=mp E2E_HBUILDERX_MP_PLATFORM=mp-baidu vitest run --bail=1 -c ./e2e/vitest.e2e.config.ts e2e/hbuilderx-local.test.ts
scripts.e2e:hbuilderx:local:mp-toutiao: cross-env E2E_HBUILDERX_LOCAL=1 E2E_HBUILDERX_CASE_GROUP=mp E2E_HBUILDERX_MP_PLATFORM=mp-toutiao vitest run --bail=1 -c ./e2e/vitest.e2e.config.ts e2e/hbuilderx-local.test.ts
scripts.e2e:hbuilderx:local:demo:mp: cross-env E2E_HBUILDERX_LOCAL=1 E2E_HBUILDERX_CASE_GROUP=mp E2E_HBUILDERX_CASE=uni-app-vite-vue3-hbuilderx-tailwindcss-v4,uni-app-x-hbuilderx-tailwindcss-v4 vitest run --bail=1 -c ./e2e/vitest.e2e.config.ts e2e/hbuilderx-local.test.ts
scripts.e2e:hbuilderx:local:demo:mp-extra: pnpm e2e:hbuilderx:local:demo:mp-alipay && pnpm e2e:hbuilderx:local:demo:mp-baidu && pnpm e2e:hbuilderx:local:demo:mp-toutiao
scripts.e2e:hbuilderx:local:demo:mp-alipay: cross-env E2E_HBUILDERX_LOCAL=1 E2E_HBUILDERX_CASE_GROUP=mp E2E_HBUILDERX_MP_PLATFORM=mp-alipay E2E_HBUILDERX_CASE=uni-app-vite-vue3-hbuilderx-tailwindcss-v4 vitest run --bail=1 -c ./e2e/vitest.e2e.config.ts e2e/hbuilderx-local.test.ts
scripts.e2e:hbuilderx:local:demo:mp-baidu: cross-env E2E_HBUILDERX_LOCAL=1 E2E_HBUILDERX_CASE_GROUP=mp E2E_HBUILDERX_MP_PLATFORM=mp-baidu E2E_HBUILDERX_CASE=uni-app-vite-vue3-hbuilderx-tailwindcss-v4 vitest run --bail=1 -c ./e2e/vitest.e2e.config.ts e2e/hbuilderx-local.test.ts
scripts.e2e:hbuilderx:local:demo:mp-toutiao: cross-env E2E_HBUILDERX_LOCAL=1 E2E_HBUILDERX_CASE_GROUP=mp E2E_HBUILDERX_MP_PLATFORM=mp-toutiao E2E_HBUILDERX_CASE=uni-app-vite-vue3-hbuilderx-tailwindcss-v4 vitest run --bail=1 -c ./e2e/vitest.e2e.config.ts e2e/hbuilderx-local.test.ts
scripts.e2e:hbuilderx:local:demo:web: cross-env E2E_HBUILDERX_LOCAL=1 E2E_HBUILDERX_CASE_GROUP=web E2E_HBUILDERX_CASE=uni-app-vite-vue3-hbuilderx-tailwindcss-v4,uni-app-x-hbuilderx-tailwindcss-v4 vitest run --bail=1 -c ./e2e/vitest.e2e.config.ts e2e/hbuilderx-local.test.ts
scripts.e2e:multiplatform-build:taro-alipay: pnpm --filter @weapp-tailwindcss-demo/taro-webpack-react-tailwindcss-v4 run build:alipay && cross-env E2E_MULTIPLATFORM_BUILD_STATUS=all E2E_MULTIPLATFORM_BUILD_CASE="^taro-webpack-react-tailwindcss-v4 alipay$" E2E_MULTIPLATFORM_BUILD_SKIP_BUILD=1 vitest run --bail=1 -c ./e2e/vitest.e2e.config.ts e2e/multiplatform-build-output.test.ts
scripts.e2e:frameworks:mp: pnpm e2e:taro:mp && pnpm e2e:mpx && pnpm e2e:uni:mp && pnpm e2e:weapp-vite
scripts.e2e:mpx: cross-env E2E_PROJECT_FILTER="^mpx-tailwindcss-v4$" pnpm e2e:static && cross-env E2E_WATCH_MAX_PLUGIN_PROCESS_MS=8000 E2E_WATCH_CASE=mpx-tailwindcss-v4 pnpm e2e:watch
scripts.e2e:uni:mp: cross-env E2E_PROJECT_FILTER="^uni-app-vite-tailwindcss-v4$" pnpm e2e:static && cross-env E2E_WATCH_MAX_PLUGIN_PROCESS_MS=8000 E2E_WATCH_CASE=uni-app-vite-tailwindcss-v4 pnpm e2e:watch
scripts.e2e:weapp-vite: cross-env E2E_PROJECT_FILTER="^weapp-vite-tailwindcss-v4$" pnpm e2e:static && cross-env E2E_WATCH_MAX_PLUGIN_PROCESS_MS=8000 E2E_WATCH_CASE=weapp-vite-tailwindcss-v4 pnpm e2e:watch
scripts.e2e:taro:mp: cross-env E2E_PROJECT_FILTER="^taro-(vite|webpack)-(react|vue3)-tailwindcss-v4$" pnpm e2e:static && cross-env TARO_E2E_WATCH_NATIVE=0 E2E_WATCH_MINI_PROGRAM_ONLY=1 E2E_WATCH_MAX_PLUGIN_PROCESS_MS=8000 E2E_WATCH_COMMAND_TIMEOUT_MS=900000 E2E_WATCH_CASE=taro-vite-react-tailwindcss-v4 pnpm e2e:watch && cross-env TARO_E2E_WATCH_NATIVE=0 E2E_WATCH_MINI_PROGRAM_ONLY=1 E2E_WATCH_MAX_PLUGIN_PROCESS_MS=8000 E2E_WATCH_COMMAND_TIMEOUT_MS=900000 E2E_WATCH_CASE=taro-webpack-react-tailwindcss-v4 pnpm e2e:watch && cross-env TARO_E2E_WATCH_NATIVE=0 E2E_WATCH_MINI_PROGRAM_ONLY=1 E2E_WATCH_MAX_PLUGIN_PROCESS_MS=8000 E2E_WATCH_COMMAND_TIMEOUT_MS=900000 E2E_WATCH_CASE=taro-vite-vue3-tailwindcss-v4 pnpm e2e:watch && cross-env TARO_E2E_WATCH_NATIVE=0 E2E_WATCH_MINI_PROGRAM_ONLY=1 E2E_WATCH_MAX_PLUGIN_PROCESS_MS=8000 E2E_WATCH_COMMAND_TIMEOUT_MS=900000 E2E_WATCH_CASE=taro-webpack-vue3-tailwindcss-v4 pnpm e2e:watch
scripts.e2e:hot-update:apps: echo "apps hot-update target has moved to demo"
scripts.e2e:watch:apps: echo "apps watch target has moved to demo"
scripts.css-build-out: css2plugin build css-plugin.css css-plugin-scss.scss --cwd test/fixtures/css --out tw-plugins
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter tailwindcss-config exec tsc -p tsconfig.json --pretty false && pnpm --filter @weapp-tailwindcss/test-helper exec tsc -p tsconfig.json --pretty false && pnpm --filter weapp-tailwindcss exec tsc -p tsconfig.build.json --noEmit --noCheck false --pretty false
scripts.dev:apps: echo "apps workspace has no demo projects"
